news.summary: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

news.headline: Meta to cut workforce by 10% as artificial intelligence spending surges
news.summary: Meta outlined plans to cut about 8,000 jobs on Thursday as it invests heavily in artificial intelligence. The move comes as part of a broader tech-sector shift towards cost control, with Microsoft also weighing voluntary buyouts ahead of next week’s earnings reports.

news.headline: Crash That Killed 2 Americans Is a Reminder of the Depth of Security Ties in Mexico
news.summary: The deaths of two C.I.A. officers in a crash in northern Mexico sparked questions about authorization and sovereignty, but also reflected a longstanding, sensitive security partnership between the two countries.

news.headline: US professors sue university over arrest during pro-Palestine protest
